name: Henderson County Schools
districtFact: Henderson County Schools publishes academic calendar PDFs with student first and last days, professional development days, opening and closing staff days, fall break, Thanksgiving break, winter break, spring break, make-up days, election days, and school hour notes.

about.title: About Henderson County Schools
about.content: Henderson County Schools is a public school district in Henderson County, Kentucky, serving students from preschool through high school. Families use the district calendar to plan student attendance, transportation, childcare, appointments, athletics, and school-year activities. The calendar lists first and last student days, professional development days, staff-only days, holidays and breaks, extended learning days, election days, possible make-up days, closing day for staff, and school hours.

about.title: How to Use This HCS Calendar
about.content: Use this page for districtwide school-year planning. Families should confirm school-specific events, preschool schedules, transportation changes, athletics, graduation details, and weather make-up decisions through Henderson County Schools and their assigned school.

planningTips.title: Planning Tips for Henderson County Families
content: Add professional development and staff-only days separately because students do not attend on those dates.
Watch possible make-up days in February, March, and May before finalizing travel or childcare.
Check election days because they are listed as no-school days in some school years.
Use the official HCS events page and PDF calendar links for revisions after weather or board updates.

compareIntro: Compare the Henderson County Schools calendar with other district calendars currently available on MySchoolDates. Dates shown include the first day, last day, and spring break.

districtFaqs.q: Which Henderson County Schools calendar does this page summarize?
districtFaqs.a: This page summarizes the official Henderson County Schools academic calendar PDFs for the listed Kentucky school years.

districtFaqs.q: Is this the North Carolina Henderson County calendar?
districtFaqs.a: No. This page is for Henderson County Schools in Henderson, Kentucky, using henderson.kyschools.us as the official district source.

districtFaqs.q: Does Henderson County Schools list make-up days?
districtFaqs.a: Yes. The calendars identify possible make-up days after student last day windows and during selected no-school dates.

districtFaqs.q: Where should families verify HCS calendar updates?
districtFaqs.a: Use the official Henderson County Schools events page and district announcements for final confirmation. MySchoolDates is an independent reference and is not affiliated with HCS.
